allow: Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu bash -c "ls ~/esp 2>/dev/null && echo 'esp dir exists' || echo 'no esp dir'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu bash -c "which idf.py 2>/dev/null || echo 'idf.py not found'; python3 --version 2>/dev/null; git --version 2>/dev/null")

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu bash -c "sudo apt-get update -qq && sudo apt-get install -y git wget flex bison gperf python3 python3-pip python3-venv cmake ninja-build ccache libffi-dev libssl-dev dfu-util libusb-1.0-0 2>&1 | tail -5")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu bash -c "which cmake && which ninja && echo 'prereqs OK' || echo 'still missing'")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu bash -c "mkdir -p ~/esp && cd ~/esp && git clone --recursive --depth=1 --branch v5.3 https://github.com/espressif/esp-idf.git esp-idf 2>&1 | tail -3")
Bash(echo "Install script running in background PID $!")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu bash -c "ls ~/.espressif/tools/xtensa-esp-elf/*/xtensa-esp-elf/bin/xtensa-esp32s3-elf-gcc 2>/dev/null | head -1 | grep -q gcc")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -u root -- bash -c "modprobe cp210x 2>&1 && sleep 1 && ls /dev/ttyUSB* 2>&1")
